title: The Bangladesh Abandoned Children (Special Provisions) (Repeal) Ordinacne, 1982
title_en: The Bangladesh Abandoned Children (Special Provisions) (Repeal) Ordinacne, 1982
description: An Ordinance to repeal the Bangladesh Abandoned Children (Special Provisions) Order, 1972. WHEREAS it is expedient to repeal the Bangladesh Abandoned Children (Special Provisions) Order, 1972 (P.O.

provisions.title: 1. Short title
provisions.content: 1. This Ordinance may be called the Bangladesh Abandoned Children (Special Provisions) (Repeal) Ordinance, 1982.

provisions.title: 2. Repeal of P.O. No. 124 of 1972
provisions.content: 2. The Bangladesh Abandoned Children (Special Provisions) Order, 1972 (P.O. No. 124 of 1972), is hereby repealed.
